study_group_representative.quote: This case study describes the major cluster transmissions of SARS-CoV-2 in South Korea and analyzes the public health authorities’ emergency measures to the pandemic crisis. It follows the case-centric approach to case study, which is different from theory-centric or theory-building approaches
